privacyNotice: Your location is recorded only during check-in/check-out for site safety purposes. No continuous tracking is performed.
outsideZoneWarning: You are outside the site zone ({distance}m / {radius}m)
connectionError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
tokenExpired: The QR code has expired. Request a new one from the supervisor.
tokenNotFound: The QR code was not found or has been deactivated.
tokenInvalidSignature: Invalid QR code. Make sure you are scanning the correct one.
tokenDefaultError: Invalid QR code. Try again or ask for help.
workerNotFound: AMKA not found among workers assigned to this site.
invalidTokenError: The QR code is no longer valid.
checkInGenericError: Error during check-in. Please try again.
